name: MediaDash
description: Keeps your library lean and playable: finds duplicate copies, broken files, oversized encodes and unwanted language tracks, then fixes them safely. Dry-run mode and a recycle bin protect your media by default.
overview: Keeps your library lean and playable.

versions.changelog: Files tab: drag-and-drop uploads. Drop one or many files onto the list to upload into the current folder. Multi-file selection via the Upload button too. Admin-only, same safety as before.

New Files tab: browse, upload, download, rename, move, copy and delete files inside your library folders. Deletes go to the recycle bin. Every operation is refused if it targets anything outside a configured library.

Fewer false-positive unplayable flags; less aggressive re-encode disk check so batches can proceed on tighter drives; live progress bar during transcodes; helpful hint when 'Run fixes now' has nothing to do; new 'Reset scan data' button in Settings > Advanced to recover from stuck state without reinstalling. Existing installs get a one-time decode-cache wipe so the playability fix takes effect immediately.
